message:
fix(ci): use name-based audit for casks

Fix deprecated `brew audit --cask [path ...]` syntax by using
`dicklesworthstone/tap/$name` format instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -92,7 +92,7 @@ jobs:
             name=$(basename "$cask" .rb)
             echo "::group::Auditing cask $name"
 
-            if brew audit --cask "$cask" 2>&1; then
+            if brew audit --cask "dicklesworthstone/tap/$name" 2>&1; then
               echo "Audit passed for cask $name"
             else
               echo "::error::Audit failed for cask $name"
